name: add-auth
description: Add authentication (JWT or session-based) to an existing app

provider.description: OAuth provider to integrate (or none for local-only auth)

steps.task: Add user registration and login endpoints using {{auth-type}} authentication. Create user model/schema, password hashing with bcrypt, and token generation. If provider is not 'none', add OAuth flow for {{provider}}.
Add auth middleware that protects existing routes. Add role-based access control if the app has admin functionality. Ensure unauthenticated requests return 401.
Write tests for authentication: registration, login, token validation, protected route access (valid token, expired token, no token), and logout if applicable. All tests must pass.
Verify end-to-end auth flow works. Create .env.example with required auth environment variables. Update README with authentication setup instructions and API endpoint documentation.
